title: AGP Error
description: Normalized protocol-level error reported between peers during a Sync session (e.g. in an ERROR frame or as an ack rejection reason). This is distinct from the normalizedErrorClass used inside route.sli.v1 evidence; see spec/transport.md section 3.

message.description: Human-readable protocol diagnostic. MUST NOT contain gossiped record content, business data, or raw exception text/stack traces; see spec/security.md section 9.

sessionId.description: The Sync session this error pertains to, if any.

retryable.description: Whether the sender MAY retry the operation that triggered this error.
